overall.description: A vehicle drives through a rain-soaked futuristic highway interchange in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), passing under massive concrete overpasses and approaching a gigantic circular megastructure in the distance. The scene features heavy rain, fog, wet reflective asphalt, and artificial lighting from streetlamps.

events.description: dark sedan overtakes on the right side
green SUV passes on the right

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through the rain-soaked highway under multiple overpass levels

notable_agents.action: dark sedan overtaking at high speed in the rain
green SUV passing by on the right lane

entered.detail: massive concrete highway interchange with multiple stacked levels and thick support columns
wet metal barrier with red reflective strips showing rain droplets
tall pole with dual horizontal LED lights illuminating the fog

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a complex highway interchange with multiple concrete overpass levels overhead. Rain falls steadily on the wet asphalt as the camera passes under the massive infrastructure. Two vehicles overtake on the right side, their taillights reflecting on the slick road surface.

events.description: entering darker section under the overpass, ambient light drops significantly

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the massive concrete overpass structure into darker shadow

entered.detail: dark textured concrete underside of the highway bridge with visible water stains
massive cylindrical concrete column supporting the overhead roadway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a darker, enclosed section directly beneath the highway overpass. The concrete ceiling dominates the upper frame while artificial lighting becomes the primary illumination. The space feels more confined as the vehicle moves through the underpass tunnel.

events.description: exiting the covered underpass into open foggy highway with massive circular megastructure visible ahead

agents.ego_description: accelerating slightly as the road opens up, approaching the distant circular structure through the fog

entered.detail: massive futuristic circular arch structure spanning the horizon like a monumental gateway
tall digital billboard with red and white advertising graphics

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dark underpass, the scene opens into a wide highway with the massive circular megastructure looming in the foggy distance. Digital billboards appear on the right side while the road stretches straight toward the monumental arch. The rain continues to fall on the wet reflective surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway passing under monumental circular arch

events.description: location text 'BIOTECHNICA FLATS' appears in lower left corner indicating area name

agents.ego_description: driving directly toward and then under the massive circular megastructure

entered.detail: curved concrete interior surface of the megastructure with green moss stains and weathering

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches and enters beneath the gigantic circular megastructure, which now dominates the entire field of view. The scale of the architecture becomes apparent as the camera drives under the curved concrete arch. Billboards pass by on the right as the journey continues through this monumental gateway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-soaked highway interchange that transitions from a confined concrete labyrinth into the shadow of a monumental megastructure. It begins by gliding under multiple levels of massive overpasses, where the taillights of overtaking vehicles reflect off the slick, wet asphalt. As the camera moves deeper into a darker, enclosed underpass, the concrete ceiling dominates the frame and artificial lighting becomes the primary source of illumination. The scene then opens into a wide, foggy expanse where digital billboards line the road and a gigantic circular arch looms in the distance. Finally, the vehicle drives directly beneath the colossal megastructure, which expands to fill the entire field of view as the camera passes through the monumental gateway.
